settings.enabled_info: Display the product bundle widget on this page
settings.bundle_id_info: Enter the specific bundle ID to display. This is automatically populated when adding the widget from the bundle admin, or you can manually enter a bundle ID here.
settings.app_url_info: Override the app server URL for development/testing. Leave blank to auto-detect. Example: https://your-tunnel.trycloudflare.com
settings.widget_max_width_info: Sets the maximum width of the entire bundle widget container on larger screens
settings.step_box_size_info: Controls the width and height of individual product selection step cards
settings.step_cards_per_row_info: Number of product step cards to display per row on larger screens
settings.button_height_info: Controls the height of the main add to cart button
settings.show_bundle_title_info: Shows the bundle name at the top of the widget
settings.show_step_numbers_info: Shows numbered indicators on each bundle step card
settings.container_spacing_info: Margin and padding around the entire widget container
settings.element_spacing_info: Space between major sections (header, steps, footer)
settings.step_card_gap_info: Gap between product step cards in the grid
settings.modal_header_padding_info: Internal padding for modal header section
settings.modal_body_padding_info: Internal padding for modal content area
settings.step_tab_border_radius_info: Rounded corners for step navigation tabs
settings.modal_product_card_height_info: Height of product cards in the modal
settings.modal_product_image_height_info: Height of product images in the modal
settings.modal_product_price_color_info: Color for product prices in the modal
settings.modal_product_price_bg_info: Background color for product price badges
settings.modal_product_title_size_info: Font size for product titles in the modal (as percentage)
settings.modal_product_price_size_info: Font size for product prices in the modal (as percentage)

settings.paragraph_content: This block is for full-page bundles on standalone pages. The Bundle ID is automatically configured when you use 'Place Widget Now' from the app admin.
settings.bundle_id_info: This is automatically set when using 'Place Widget Now' from the app admin. Only enter manually if you're setting up a custom page.
settings.app_url_info: Override the app server URL for development/testing. Leave blank to auto-detect.
settings.custom_title_info: Override the bundle name with custom text. Leave empty to use bundle name from app.
settings.custom_description_info: Add a custom description below the title. Leave empty to use bundle description from app.
settings.custom_instruction_info: Override the default instruction text. Leave empty to use auto-generated instructions.
settings.show_step_timeline_info: Display the step progress indicator at the top
settings.show_category_tabs_info: Display category/collection tabs for filtering products

ui.error_bundle_not_found: Bundle not found. Please check your configuration.

errors.failed_to_add_cart: Failed to add bundle to cart
errors.missing_required_step: Please complete this step before proceeding
errors.network_error: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
